description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade features a recessed entryway with a glass door, flanked by large windows and a small porch area. A prominent tree and manicured lawn are situated to the right of the entrance, adding greenery to the otherwise minimalist exterior. The side and rear elevations are mostly solid, with minimal window openings and a focus on privacy. The roof includes a central cut-out or terrace area, visible from above, which may serve as a private outdoor space. The overall color palette is neutral, dominated by shades of gray and white, with subtle landscaping elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with a minimalist facade, large windows, and landscaped greenery at the front. The design emphasizes clean lines, privacy, and a neutral color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, a small porch, and a landscaped area with a tree.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid wall with minimal openings and the tree extending from the front yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a recessed section with a covered patio or terrace and limited window exposure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing another solid wall, a secondary landscaped area, and the continuation of the flat roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed glass door with a small porch, no steps, and minimal decorative elements.
